dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6492 IH: Empowering Small-business Ownership Participation Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Mills introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Armed Services

form.official-title: To change the percentage of outstanding stock that must be held through an employee stock ownership plan for the purposes of the pilot program to incentivize contracting with employee-owned businesses of the Department of Defense, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Empowering Small-business Ownership Participation Act or the ESOP Act.

section.header: Change to ESOP percentage requirement for pilot program to incentivize contracting with employee-owned businesses
section.text: Section 874 of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2022 (10 U.S.C. 3204 note) is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking wholly-owned each place it appears and inserting owned;

subparagraph.text: in the heading, by striking Wholly-owned and inserting Owned; and
by striking 100 percent and inserting not less than 30 percent;

paragraph.text: in subsection (b), in the heading, by striking Wholly-owned and inserting Owned; and
in subsection (c), in the heading, by striking Wholly-owned and inserting Owned.
